summary: SINGLE_FOCUS Cantor ternary set construction. Horizontal stack of levels C_0..C_6 via ValueTracker level_tr. always_redraw rebuilds 2^L surviving intervals per level (BLUE→RED gradient). Middle thirds recursively removed. Live 2^L count, (2/3)^L total length → 0 (measure zero, uncountable, dim log 2/log 3 ≈ 0.6309).
